# Telegram

Telegram provides an API for third-party apps to display sponsored messages that replicate Telegram functionality. However, the API endpoints do not provide access to a comprehensive ad database. The ad-related endpoints return only active ads in known channels so that the Telegram clients can show them to their users. Telegram also offers the [Telegram Ad Platform](ads.telegram.org) for creating and managing sponsored messages in public channels, enabling advertisers to manage their ads and budgets and monitor performance. However, this is also not a public ad repository for extracting data about all advertising content promoted on the platform.
